# metaverse.center

> Multiplayer worldbuilding platform with AI-driven simulations, competitive PvP epochs, and procedural Resonance Dungeons.
> 90+ database tables, 165+ PostgreSQL functions, 450+ API endpoints, 256 web components. 6593 i18n strings (100% EN/DE). 188 SQL migrations. 104 documentation files.
> Stack: FastAPI + Lit 3 + Supabase + OpenRouter. Bilingual EN/DE.
